Package shelter.cli.print

package shelter.cli.print
Rendering utilities for the shelter print dashboard command. Classes here convert live repository state into a Markdown snapshot and detect data-directory changes to drive the file-watcher refresh loop.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    shelter.cli
    Presentation layer — Picocli-based CLI entry points for all shelter management commands.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    DataDirHash
    Computes a stable content hash over every *.csv file in a data directory.
    MarkdownRenderer
    Renders the full system snapshot as markdown suitable for VS Code's preview pane.
    SnapshotRenderer
    Renders the full 8-section system snapshot as plain text.
